title: Autopilot execution configuration
description: Schema for .autopilot.json. The build/test command pattern is a COARSE first-line filter (launcher allowlist + no shell metacharacters); the authoritative trusted-command enforcement — argv tokenization, a flag denylist (e.g. pwsh/powershell -EncodedCommand/-Command, npx, pip install), and PATH hardening — lives in scripts/autopilot/launch.ps1 OUTSIDE the agent-editable config, so an autopilot run cannot widen its own command policy. Targets JSON Schema draft-07 to match Test-Json capabilities in PowerShell 7.

$schema.description: Optional editor association; ignored at runtime.

runtime.description: Execution mode. 'sandbox' is out of scope for this plan. The launcher -Mode parameter overrides this default.

planPath.description: Repo-relative path to the plan.md the autopilot run executes. Must be traversal-free (no '..'), contain no absolute/drive prefix or shell metacharacters, and end in .md. The launcher canonicalizes it against the repo root.

build.description: Build command. Coarse filter: must begin with a trusted launcher and contain no shell metacharacters; executed as argv with no shell. Authoritative flag-denylist + argv tokenization run in launch.ps1.

test.description: Test command. Same trusted-launcher + no-metacharacter coarse filter as build; authoritative checks run in launch.ps1.

timeout.description: Per-phase timeout in minutes before force-kill.

maxIterationsPerStep.description: Fix-retry cap per step to bound in-phase churn.

credentialTarget.description: Windows Credential Manager target name holding the fine-grained PAT.
